summary: Comprehensive testing of FALINTIL-FDTL disciplinary management system completed. Backend APIs 100% functional with proper role-based permissions. Frontend 95% functional with excellent UI/UX. Minor issues found with status buttons visibility for read-only roles.

ui_bugs.issue: Status change buttons (Em Processo, Processar, Arquivar, Anular) are visible for Pessoal Superior role but should be hidden for read-only access

integration_issues.issue: Activity logs page not loading properly for Super Admin role

passed_tests: Login functionality for all 4 user roles (Super Admin, Admin, Pessoal Justiça, Pessoal Superior)
Dashboard statistics and charts display correctly
Cases list with filters (Status, Posto) and search functionality
Case creation form with all required fields and dropdowns
Case detail view with complete information display
Role-based navigation menu (Users/Logs hidden for unauthorized roles)
New case button hidden for read-only roles (Pessoal Superior)
Edit/Delete buttons hidden for read-only roles
Cases CRUD operations with proper permissions
User management API with role restrictions
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix status change buttons visibility for Pessoal Superior role in CaseDetail component. Investigate Activity Logs page loading issue for Super Admin.
